The focus is on Abhishek's growing influence and organizational control.

title: After 8,000 layoffs, Meta tells 7,000 employees: You can make the real impact on this team
description: Meta is making big changes. Thousands of employees are moving to new AI teams. This is part of a major company-wide AI focus. CEO Mark Zuckerberg wants to strengthen Meta's AI position. Some workers are calling it an 'AI draft'. The company is also developing new AI tools. This restructuring shows Meta's growing commitment to artificial intelligence.
